concepts.name: Housing-cost unaffordability
concepts.working_definition: The degree to which required housing expenditure constrains a household’s disposable resources relative to a defined affordability standard.

operationalizations.name: Housing-cost burden ratio
operationalizations.formula_or_rule: total required housing costs / disposable household income
operationalizations.scale: continuous ratio and threshold sensitivity variants
operationalizations.missingness_policy: Do not infer zero cost or income; report and model missingness explicitly.

concepts.name: Support for right-populist or anti-establishment parties
concepts.working_definition: Observed vote choice, validated vote intention or aggregate vote share assigned under a versioned local party-family taxonomy.

operationalizations.name: Versioned party-family support indicator
operationalizations.formula_or_rule: Map party at election date to one or more locally reviewed family labels; retain multi-label and contested states.
operationalizations.missingness_policy: Unclassified and contested parties remain explicit unknowns.
comparability_conditions: taxonomy version pinned to election date

relations.rationale: The causal relation is the research target and must not be encoded as a fact in the measurement charter.
